name: Idaho Chicken Scallop
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Chicken, cooked, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add onion and celery with leaves; cook until tender.
3. Blend in flour; stir in milk.
4. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and comes to boil.
5. Stir in lemon juice, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt, pepper, marjoram, and chicken; remove from heat.
6. Pare potatoes; cut into very thin slices.
7. Place sliced potatoes in a greased 1 1/2-quart baking dish; sprinkle with remaining salt.
8. Pour chicken sauce over potatoes; sprinkle with paprika and cover. Bake in preheated 425°F oven for 1 hour, or until potatoes are tender.
